description: External tools required for the binary-stripped checkpoint phase

llvm-strip.description: LLVM binary stripper tool (removes debug symbols)

z3.description: Z3 Theorem Prover (required dependency of llvm-strip on macOS)
z3.notes: On macOS, llvm@16 links against z3. If z3 is upgraded, llvm@16 may need to be reinstalled: brew reinstall llvm@16
